text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Hyacinth Stakes and my Umas are as
precious as ever! ♪ But I've got this strange
feeling they're even more dazzling than before...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like beneath their grace lies something even
more pristine. Oooh, I just have to see it! I'm
going to get even closer than before!
